title: Zoom callout (signature feature)
goal: Select a box → magnified callout with leader lines, fully live and restyleable.

tasks.title: ZoomCallout rasterizer: re-render source region at magnification, border+shadow+radius
tasks.notes: DocumentRenderer.ciImage now takes the composite-so-far as `backdrop`; .zoomCallout crops it to sourceRect (clamped to canvas, <1pt → skipped) and the existing scale-to-frame step provides magnification, so border/shadow/radius come free from LayerStyle. Callout sees only layers BELOW it. Liveness (5.5) falls out of this design — pixel-tested in ZoomCalloutRenderingTests.sourcePixelChangeReRendersInCallout. Gotcha: renderSprite() builds a single-layer doc, so a dragged callout sprite renders empty — 5.3 must handle drag preview differently (e.g. include backdrop layers or pre-render).

tasks.title: Source-region outline + leader lines drawn in matching style
tasks.notes: ZoomCalloutOverlayRasterizer (PhotonzRender) draws source outline + leader lines in canvas space (CG, top-left coords, returns image+origin); DocumentRenderer composites it beneath the callout box inside the layer loop. Outline: border color/width (1pt hairline floor when borderWidth=0), radius = style.cornerRadius/magnification so both boxes read as the same shape. Leaders: full outline width at 0.6 alpha (half-width was sub-pixel-invisible); endpoints from Geometry.leaderLines attach at frame corners, so caps peek over rounded corners — accepted, matches other tools.

tasks.title: Tool UX: drag box → callout appears animated into place; drag callout to reposition (leader lines follow)
Inspector: magnification slider, border color/width, shape (rect/circle)
Liveness: callout re-renders when source pixels change beneath it
